revision.text:
For [[Geographic coordinate system|coordinates]], use {{tl|coord}} with ''display=inline{{#ifeq:{{{title|}}}|no||,title}}''. Please do not be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]].<noinclude>
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
For [[:en:Geographic coordinate system|coordinates]], use {{tl|coord}} with ''display=inline{{#ifeq:{{{title|}}}|no||,title}}''. Please do not be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]].<noinclude>
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
For [[:en:Geographic coordinate system|coordinates]], use {{tl|coord}} with ''display=inline{{#ifeq:{{{title|}}}|no||,title}}''. Please do not be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]].<noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
For [[:en:Geographic coordinate system|coordinates]], use {{tl|coord}} with ''display=inline{{#ifeq:{{{title|}}}|no||,title}}''. Please do not be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]].<noinclude>

revision.text:
For [[:en:Geographic coordinate system|coordinates]], use {{tl|coord}} with ''display=inline{{#ifeq:{{{title|}}}|no||,title}}''. Please do not be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]].<noinclude>
